metadata.title: ASL Sign Language Pose Sequences Reference (v2)
metadata.description: Corrected pose sequences using RIGHT_HAND_TO_DISTANCE_FROM_FACE and LEFT_HAND_TO_DISTANCE_FROM_FACE as the neutral visible/ready position (elbow bent, hand raised in front of face — the standard signing space). Every word begins by bringing the hand into this visible position before performing the sign.
metadata.key_insight: DISTANCE_FROM_FACE = hand held up in front of face with elbow bent. This is the base signing position. Signs then move TO forehead, TO chest, or change hand shape FROM this position.

pose_roles.RIGHT_HAND_TO_DISTANCE_FROM_FACE: Neutral ready position — right hand raised, elbow bent, hand visible in front of face. Starting point for most right-hand signs.
pose_roles.LEFT_HAND_TO_DISTANCE_FROM_FACE: Neutral ready position — left hand raised, elbow bent, hand visible in front of face. Starting point for most left-hand signs.
pose_roles.RIGHT_HAND_TO_DISTANCE_FROM_FOREHEAD: Hand raised slightly above face level, near forehead height — used as approach before forehead contact.
pose_roles.LEFT_HAND_TO_DISTANCE_FROM_FOREHEAD: Left hand raised near forehead height — used as approach before left forehead contact.
pose_roles.RIGHT_HAND_TO_FOREHEAD: Right hand makes contact with forehead.
pose_roles.RIGHT_HAND_TO_CHEST: Right hand makes contact with chest.
pose_roles.LEFT_HAND_TO_FOREHEAD: Left hand makes contact with forehead.
pose_roles.LEFT_HAND_TO_CHEST: Left hand makes contact with chest.

YES.description: Fist held up in signing space, nods forward and back twice like a head nodding yes

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Close all fingers into a fist in signing space
Bend wrist forward then back — repeat twice (nodding fist motion)

NO.description: Index and middle finger snap down to thumb twice in signing space

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Extend index finger, others closed
Extend middle finger alongside index (two fingers up)
Snap both fingers down closed against thumb — repeat twice

HELLO.description: Open palm salute — hand moves from forehead outward into signing space

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open all fingers flat
Move hand up to forehead — salute contact
Sweep hand outward away from forehead back to visible distance

THINK.description: Index finger taps the side of the forehead

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Extend index finger only, others closed
Move index finger up toward forehead
Tap index fingertip to side of forehead

KNOW.description: Flat open hand taps fingertips to forehead

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open all fingers flat
Raise hand toward forehead level
Tap fingertips to forehead

FORGET.description: Open hand sweeps across forehead, closing into a fist as it pulls away

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open all fingers flat
Place open hand against forehead
Sweep hand away from forehead, closing fingers into fist as it pulls back to distance
Fist held out in visible signing space

ME.description: Index finger points inward to touch own chest

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest

YOU.description: Index finger extends and points outward toward the other person

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward the other person

PLEASE.description: Open palm placed on chest, rubbed in a circular motion

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open all fingers, palm facing inward (west)
Bring open palm down and place flat on chest, rub in circular motion

SORRY.description: Closed fist rubbed in a circle on the chest

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Close all fingers into a fist
Bring fist down to chest, rub in circular motion

THANK YOU.description: Flat hand touches chin/lips then extends outward toward the person

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips to chin / lower face
Extend hand forward outward away from face toward person

GOOD.description: Flat right hand touches chin, then drops into open left palm

steps.action: Bring left hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open left hand flat, palm facing up to act as receiving surface
Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open all fingers flat on right hand
Touch right fingertips to chin / lower face
Drop right hand downward, palm facing down, land onto left palm

STRONG.description: Right arm flexes into a bicep / muscle pose in signing space

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Flex right arm upward into bicep muscle pose

STOP.description: Right hand chops sharply down onto open left palm

steps.action: Bring left hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open left hand, palm facing up (base/surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open right hand flat, palm facing east (blade/karate position)
Chop right hand downward onto left palm

HELP.description: Right thumb-up fist placed on open left palm; both hands lift upward together

steps.action: Bring left hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open left hand, palm facing up (base surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Extend right thumb up, close other fingers (thumbs-up shape)
Rest right thumb-fist onto left open palm
Lift both hands upward together — palm now facing north

WAIT.description: Both hands open, palms facing up in signing space, fingers flutter slightly

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Bring left hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up — hold both out, fingers flutter

GIVE.description: Hand starts near chest, opens palm-up, then extends outward toward recipient

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Bring right hand inward toward chest
Open hand, palm facing up
Extend hand outward away from body toward recipient

RECEIVE.description: Both hands open palms up in signing space, draw inward toward chest

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Bring left hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up
Draw both hands inward toward chest

MAYBE.description: Both hands open palms up in signing space, alternate up and down like a balance scale

steps.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Bring left hand to visible signing position — elbow bent, hand in front of face
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up
Tilt right palm to face down while left stays up
Alternate — tilt right back up, left tilts down — repeat the scale motion

sentences.grammar_note: Both signs flow naturally one after the other.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Move hand up to forehead — salute contact
Sweep hand outward away from forehead
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips to chin / lower face
Extend hand forward outward away from face toward person

sentences.grammar_note: ME establishes subject; STRONG is the comment (topic-comment structure).

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Move hand up to forehead — salute contact
Sweep hand outward away from forehead
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Bring right hand back to visible signing position
Flex right arm upward into bicep muscle pose

sentences.grammar_note: PLEASE at start adds politeness; ME at the end is the object of HELP.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers, palm facing inward (west)
Bring open palm down to chest, rub in circular motion
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up (base surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend right thumb up, close other fingers
Rest right thumb-fist on left palm, lift both upward
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers, palm facing inward (west)
Bring open palm down to chest, rub in circular motion
Bring right hand back to visible signing position
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up — hold both out, fingers flutter

sentences.grammar_note: Polite but firm. STOP is a clear two-hand sign.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers, palm facing inward (west)
Bring open palm down to chest, rub in circular motion
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up (base surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open right hand flat, palm facing east (blade position)
Chop right hand downward onto left palm

sentences.grammar_note: GIVE directionally moves from chest outward toward the recipient.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers, palm facing inward (west)
Bring open palm down to chest, rub in circular motion
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Bring right hand inward toward chest, open
Open hand palm facing up
Extend hand outward toward recipient
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest

sentences.grammar_note: ME establishes subject; SORRY on chest conveys the apology.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Close all fingers into a fist
Bring fist down to chest, rub in circular motion

sentences.english: I am sorry. You are good.
sentences.grammar_note: Two-part sentence. YOU shifts reference; GOOD completes the compliment.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Close all fingers into a fist
Bring fist down to chest, rub in circular motion
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat on right hand
Touch right fingertips to chin / lower face
Drop right hand downward, palm facing down, land onto left palm

sentences.grammar_note: ASL opinion structure: subject → THINK → topic → comment.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Raise index finger toward forehead level
Tap index fingertip to side of forehead
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat on right hand
Touch right fingertips to chin / lower face
Drop right hand downward, palm facing down, land onto left palm

sentences.grammar_note: MAYBE softens the suggestion. Natural in advice or negotiation context.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Raise hand toward forehead level
Tap fingertips to forehead
Return right hand to visible signing position
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up
Tilt right palm down while left stays up — alternate, repeat
Return left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up (base surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing east (blade position)
Chop right hand downward onto left palm

sentences.grammar_note: Common social phrase. Smooth flow from head to chest.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Place open hand against forehead
Sweep hand away from forehead, closing fingers into fist
Fist held out in visible signing space
Close all fingers into a fist (already closed from FORGET)
Bring fist down to chest, rub in circular motion
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up (base surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend right thumb up, close other fingers
Rest right thumb-fist on left palm, lift both upward
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers, palm facing inward (west)
Bring open palm down to chest, rub in circular motion
Return right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips to chin / lower face
Extend hand forward outward away from face
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up (base surface)
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing east (blade position)
Chop right hand downward onto left palm
Return right hand to visible signing position
Left hand stays at visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up — hold both out, fingers flutter
Return right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips to chin / lower face
Extend hand forward outward away from face

sentences.grammar_note: Describes an exchange. YOU and ME establish the two parties clearly.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Return right hand to visible signing position
Bring right hand inward toward chest, open
Open hand, palm facing up
Extend hand outward toward recipient
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up
Draw both hands inward toward chest

sentences.grammar_note: Simple affirmation. YES at the end emphasizes enthusiasm.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat on right hand
Touch right fingertips to chin / lower face
Drop right hand downward, palm facing down, land onto left palm
Return right hand to visible signing position
Close all fingers into a fist
Bend wrist forward then back — repeat twice (nodding fist)
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Return right hand to visible signing position
Flex right arm upward into bicep muscle pose
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Raise hand toward forehead level
Tap fingertips to forehead

sentences.grammar_note: Grateful compliment. Natural closing to a conversation.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat
Touch fingertips to chin / lower face
Extend hand forward outward away from face
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open left hand, palm facing up
Bring right hand to visible signing position
Open all fingers flat on right hand
Touch right fingertips to chin / lower face
Drop right hand downward, palm facing down, land onto left palm

sentences.english: Maybe you give. Maybe I receive.
sentences.asl_gloss: MAYBE YOU GIVE MAYBE ME RECEIVE
sentences.grammar_note: Negotiation phrasing. MAYBE repeated signals uncertainty on both sides.

pose_sequence.action: Bring right hand to visible signing position
Bring left hand to visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up
Tilt right palm down while left stays up — alternate, repeat
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Turn palm to face east — point outward toward person
Return right hand to visible signing position
Bring right hand inward toward chest, open
Open hand, palm facing up
Extend hand outward toward recipient
Both hands at visible signing position
Left hand at visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
Open left hand, palm facing up
Tilt right palm down while left stays up — alternate, repeat
Return right hand to visible signing position
Extend index finger only
Point finger toward and touch chest
Return right hand to visible signing position
Left hand at visible signing position
Open right hand, palm facing up
